bugs.report_text: The responsive grid layout fails on mobile, displaying two columns instead of one, and collapses to a single column on desktop instead of showing two columns.
List items have uneven or missing horizontal spacing due to an invalid style declaration failing to apply.
bugs.neg_code: className="flex items-center py-2 px-3 hover:bg-gradient-to-r hover:from-blue-50 hover:to-purple-50 rounded-md cursor-pointer text-gray-700 transition-all group"
bugs.pos_code: className="flex items-center py-2 pxx-3 hover:bg-gradient-to-r hover:from-blue-50 hover:to-purple-50 rounded-md cursor-pointer text-gray-700 transition-all group"

bugs.report_text: The footer grid layout breaks responsiveness, showing two columns on mobile and a single column on desktop instead of the intended opposite.
The footer divider section is pulled upward unexpectedly due to conflicting spacing declarations.
The card element has inconsistent internal spacing causing layout distortion and uneven content alignment.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-purple-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-blue-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow text-center">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-purple-50 rounded-lg p-4 -p-8 border border-blue-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow text-center">

bugs.report_text: The header element has an unnecessary layering directive that may cause unexpected rendering or stacking context problems.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white py-16 px-8">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white py-16 px-8 z-0">

bugs.report_text: The decorative blur element shifts to an unexpected position due to duplicate conflicting spacing instructions.
The toolbar is anchored to the screen corner and overlaps the page content instead of staying in the document flow.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex gap-3 flex-wrap items-center mb-4 absolute top-0 left-0">

bugs.report_text: The button displays with a broken gradient starting color and washed-out text that fails to contrast properly against the background.
